title: Session 17 — Back to Koviz
bodyText:
# What happened
Two teams: **team sneaky** (find [[giuseppe|G]]) and **team loud** (find [[filbert]]). En route, a goblin trap was spotted and dispatched — one escaped, one captured, and **[[cumb]] "spared her from torture" by killing her himself**. In [[koviz]]: the **F & B company's expansion** everywhere (posters of [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] and Filbert, "[[gond]]'s Gift to Koviz"), awkward Filbert conversations, G found and briefed. Planning at Gond's Craft ([[gabriel]] vetoed hideout status) moved to **[[pc-varen|Varen]]'s apartment** for the night.
